photos.content:
Use the uploaded photo as the identity reference.

IMPORTANT: Keep the EXACT same face and identity. Do not stylize the face.

CONCEPT: Calm, dreamy, peaceful motherhood moment.

BACKGROUND: Minimal studio with soft window-like light, beige/cream tones, clean and empty.

OUTFIT: Long soft silk maternity dress, flowing naturally around the legs.

POSE & FRAMING: Sitting gently on the floor or low stool, legs folded to the side, both hands resting on belly, head slightly tilted down, soft loving smile, relaxed and intimate mood.

LIGHTING & STYLE: Soft window light effect, warm tones, photorealistic, smooth shadows, shallow depth of field, fine-art maternity photography, 4K.

photos.content:
Use the uploaded photo as the identity reference.

IMPORTANT: Keep the EXACT same face and identity. Do not modify facial features, proportions, or ethnicity. Only change pose, outfit, and background.

CONCEPT: Soft, feminine maternity photoshoot with flowing silk dress, elegant and graceful motherhood.

BACKGROUND: Minimalist studio, clean beige/cream solid background, soft high-key natural light, smooth shadows, no props or objects.

OUTFIT: Long ivory/cream silk maternity dress, soft flowing fabric, light and airy texture, slightly draped sleeves, natural exposed belly shape under silk, minimal jewelry.

POSE & FRAMING: Standing facing camera, full body shot, both hands gently holding the belly, silk dress slightly flowing around legs, relaxed shoulders, calm soft smile.

LIGHTING & STYLE: Soft diffused studio light, glowing skin tones, 85mm lens, f/2.0, shallow depth of field, photorealistic, luxury editorial maternity photography, 4K.
